Just like someone had to tell you about Jesus,
they need someone to tell them about Jesus.
Amen?
Let's pray.
Father, we love you.
Thank you for loving us.
Thank you for the word of God.
Thank you that you've given to us the truth
that we can know the truth.
And God, I pray that the truth would stir us.
Think of Paul when he was there in Athens
and he saw a city that was wholly given to idolatry
and how his spirit was stirred within him.
And he went into that place
and he preached unto them Jesus.
He said, I saw this altar to the unknown God.
Him declare I unto you.
Oh God, would you help us to be good, faithful ambassadors,
to be your witnesses, to go forth
and preach the gospel to every creature.
We believe the coming of the Lord draweth nigh.
We do not in any way try to set dates or timelines,
but Lord, I pray you'd help us to be motivated,
to live a life that pleases you,
and that you'd give us the opportunity
to bring as many people to heaven with us
as we possibly can.
Thank you that the gospel is the power of God unto salvation.
Thank you that you still save sinners.
Use us, God, for your glory and we'll thank you for it.
In Christ's name we pray.
